title: BDA Histology
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f5edp","text":"Staining protocol for visualization of BDA 3K.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6q5pf","text":"Species - Feline","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"m9a5","text":"Tissue Preparation - Perfusion of 4% PAF; Cryoprotected 30% Sucrose; Section thickness of 60 microns","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Reconstitute the Vectastain ABC solution Prepare 80 mL solution: 79 mL 0.1 Molarity (M) Physiological Buffer 480 µL Solution A 480 µL Solution B Avidin/Biotin HRP Complex Vector Laboratories Catalog #PK-6100 Thaw 6 x 1mL vials of NGS for later use Normal Goat Serum Cedarlane Catalog #CL1200-500
Rinse sections in 0.1 M Physiological Buffer (4x5min) 00:05:00 00:05:00 00:05:00 00:05:00
Block Endogenous Peroxidase 105 mL Methanol 45 mL De-ionized Water 750 µL 30 % volume Hydrogen Peroxide 00:30:00
Rinse sections in 0.1 M Physiological Buffer (4x5min) 00:05:00 00:05:00 00:05:00 00:05:00
Transfer tissue to individual reaction wells and incubate in Avidin/Biotin HRP Complex Prepared in Step 1 01:30:00
Transfer tissue back to reaction trays and rinse sections in 0.1 M Physiological Buffer (3x10min) 00:10:00 00:10:00 00:10:00

Incubate in DAB-Nickel Chromogen Solution 150 mL 0.1 Molarity (M) Physiological Buffer .1125 g 3,3' Diaminobenzidine Tetrachloride (DAB) 1.875 mL 1 Mass / % volume Cobalt Chloride (Added dropwise) 3 mL 1 Mass / % volume Nickel Ammonium Sulfate (Added dropwise) 50 µL 30 % volume Hydrogen Peroxide (Added 60s before incubation) 3,3′-Diaminobenzidine tetrahydrochloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D5905 00:20:00 (Approximate time - Actual endpoint determined visually)
Rinse sections in 0.1 M Physiological Buffer (3x5min) 00:05:00 00:05:00 00:05:00
